title: MD
biography: Alexandre Yersin was a Swiss-French physician who co-discovered the plague bacillus Yersinia pestis in 1894 during a Hong Kong plague epidemic. He was also instrumental in establishing the Pasteur Institute in Vietnam.
aiSummary: Alexander Yersin is a bacteriology specialist at Pasteur Institute. Based in Nha Trang.

timeline.title: Discovered plague bacillus
timeline.description: Isolated the bacterium causing bubonic plague during the Hong Kong epidemic, later named Yersinia pestis in his honor
